---
title: "CV"
---

# Curriculum Vitae

[Download PDF version](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Education

**Dublin City University**  
MSc Business Analytics | 2025 – Present

Key focus areas include SQL, Python, Excel, Power BI, machine learning, generative AI, ethics, data governance, and strategic thinking.

**Dublin City University**  
BA Business Studies International | 2021 – 2025

Final-year specialism: Business Economics. I also completed a year abroad at the Autonomous University of Barcelona, where I developed my language skills and gained valuable international experience.

## Skills

### Analytics and Technical
- Excel
- SQL
- Python
- Power BI
- Statistical analysis
- Data visualisation and reporting

### Business and Professional
- Analytical and critical thinking
- Problem-solving
- Communication and presentation
- Teamwork
- Time management
- Working under pressure

## Experience

**General Assistant**  
Gate Group Dublin | 2021 – Present

- Prepared and packed airline food products in compliance with strict quality, hygiene, and safety standards
- Worked efficiently in a fast-paced, time-critical environment
- Supported team operations to meet flight schedules and operational targets
- Built reliability, attention to detail, teamwork, and time management skills through continuous employment

## Interests

- Volunteer work with the Louth SPCA
- Films and books
